name: AbraSilver Resource Corp.
description: AbraSilver Resource Corp., formerly Abraplata Resource Corp., is a Canadian-based precious metals exploration company. The company is focused on rapidly advancing its 100%-owned Diablillos silver-gold project in the mining-friendly Salta province of Argentina. The Diablillos property has a well-defined, high-grade silver-gold resource, and the company is actively exploring other highly prospective targets on the property, as well as its La Coipita copper-gold project in San Juan, Argentina.
